items.title: Suicidal Empathy
items.author: Gad Saad
items.synopsis_full: The host of the podcast “The Saad Truth” argues that what he considers misguided compassion is having a negative impact on society.

items.title: Kpop Demon Hunters
items.author: Jessica Yoon
items.synopsis_short: Huntrix takes on the Saja Boys,…
items.synopsis_full: Huntrix takes on the Saja Boys, a boy band who happen to be demons in disguise. Based on the movie. (Ages 7 to 10)

items.title: On Courage
items.author: Julia Angwin and Ami Fields-Meyer
items.synopsis_short: The authors of the New Yorker…
items.synopsis_full: The authors of the New Yorker essay “So You Want to Be a Dissident?” profile people who stood up to authoritarianism.

items.title: Los Náufragos Del Wager / the Wager
items.author: David Grann
items.synopsis_short: The survivors of a shipwrecked British…
items.synopsis_full: The survivors of a shipwrecked British vessel on a secret mission during an imperial war with Spain have different accounts of events.

items.title: The Simple Path To Wealth
items.author: JL Collins
items.synopsis_full: "This comprehensive guide covers everything from debt elimination to optimizing retirement accounts, all while exposing the marketing myths and investment industry practices that keep most people from building real wealth. Collins shares specific, actionable strategies for both wealth-building and wealth-preservation phases, with a straightforward approach to asset allocation that anyone can implement"--

items.author: Cindy Pham
items.synopsis_short: Two sisters discover an underground, magical…
items.synopsis_full: Two sisters discover an underground, magical dreamworld. (Ages 14 and up)

items.title: Mailman
items.author: Stephen Starring Grant
items.synopsis_short: After losing his corporate job and…
items.synopsis_full: After losing his corporate job and being diagnosed with cancer, Grant becomes a mailman in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Virginia.

items.title: The Wonderful Things You Will Be
items.author: Emily Winfield Martin
items.synopsis_full: A celebration of future possibilities. (Ages 3 to 7)

items.title: Fake Skating
items.author: Lynn Painter
items.synopsis_short: After years of separation, the childhood…
items.synopsis_full: After years of separation, the childhood friends Alec and Dani reunite and face their true feelings toward each other. (Ages 14 and up)

items.synopsis_full: Denji starts eating everything around him and must work with Yoru to get free of the Aging Devil.
